summary: Frontend testing of new features: Dashboard configurable widgets, CRM credit_days field, Purchase Order PDF download, and Settings logo preview. All 4 features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - recharts library issue when container not ready, does not affect functionality

frontend_flows: Company Admin login via /empresa/cia-servicios-demo-sa-de-cv/login - SUCCESS
Dashboard 'Configurar' button visible in top-right header area
Dashboard config Sheet opens with title 'Configurar Dashboard'
Dashboard Sheet shows 8 widget checkboxes (WIDGET_DEFINITIONS)
Widget visibility toggles work correctly
Dashboard config saves to localStorage with 'Configuración guardada' toast
CRM page loads with client table
CRM 'Nuevo Cliente/Prospecto' form opens
CRM form shows 'Probabilidad de Cierre (%)' when Tipo=Prospecto
CRM form shows 'Plazo de Crédito (días)' when Tipo=Cliente
CRM credit_days field accepts numeric input
Purchases (Compras) page loads with PO table
Purchases dropdown menu shows 'Descargar PDF' option at top
Purchases PDF download initiates with 'Generando PDF...' toast
Purchases PDF downloads with 'PDF descargado' success toast
Settings (Configuración) page loads correctly
Settings shows 'Logo de la Empresa' section
Settings logo preview displays company logo correctly
Settings 'Subir Logo' upload button available
Sidebar header shows company logo (CIA SERVICIOS)

success_rate.backend: Not tested (per request - backend already verified via curl)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features verified working: 1) Dashboard has 'Configurar' button that opens Sheet with 8 toggleable widget checkboxes. 2) CRM client form conditionally shows 'Plazo de Crédito (días)' field when Tipo=Cliente, and 'Probabilidad de Cierre (%)' when Tipo=Prospecto. 3) Purchases page dropdown has 'Descargar PDF' option that triggers PDF generation/download via /api/pdf/purchase-order/{id} endpoint. 4) Settings page shows logo preview in 'Logo de la Empresa' section, supporting both logo_file (base64) and logo_url fallback.

dashboard_configurable_widgets.ui: Button 'Configurar' opens Sheet with 8 widget checkboxes, saves to localStorage

crm_credit_days_field.ui: Shows 'Plazo de Crédito (días)' when Tipo dropdown set to 'Cliente'

purchase_order_pdf_download.ui: Dropdown > 'Descargar PDF' option triggers PDF generation/download

settings_logo_preview.ui: Shows logo preview in 'Logo de la Empresa' section with upload button
